AwsConfigProvider
Credential provider using Amazon AWS credentials file.
AwsEnvironmentProvider
Credential provider using Amazon AWS specific environment variables.
BaseArgs
Common arguments of BucketArgs, ListBucketsArgs and PutObjectFanOutEntry.
BaseArgs.Builder<B extends BaseArgs.Builder<B,A>,A extends BaseArgs>
Base builder which builds arguments.
BaseIdentityProvider
Base provider of LdapIdentityProvider, CertificateIdentityProvider, WebIdentityClientGrantsProvider and AssumeRoleProvider.
BaseIdentityProvider.Response
Response to get credentials of BaseIdentityProvider.
BasePartsResult
Base part information for ListPartsResult and GetObjectAttributesOutput.ObjectParts.
BaseS3Client
Core S3 API client.
BaseSelectParameters
Base select parameters information for SelectObjectContentRequest and RestoreRequest.SelectParameters.
BucketArgs
Common arguments of BucketExistsArgs, CreateBucketBaseArgs, DeleteBucketCorsArgs, DeleteBucketEncryptionArgs, DeleteBucketLifecycleArgs, DeleteBucketNotificationArgs, DeleteBucketPolicyArgs, DeleteBucketReplicationArgs, DeleteBucketTagsArgs, DeleteObjectLockConfigurationArgs, DeleteObjectsArgs, GetBucketCorsArgs, GetBucketEncryptionArgs, GetBucketLifecycleArgs, GetBucketLocationArgs, GetBucketNotificationArgs, GetBucketPolicyArgs, GetBucketReplicationArgs, GetBucketTagsArgs, GetBucketVersioningArgs, GetObjectLockConfigurationArgs, ListenBucketNotificationArgs, ListMultipartUploadsArgs, ListObjectsArgs, ListObjectsV1Args, ListObjectsV2Args, ListObjectVersionsArgs, ListPartsArgs, ObjectArgs, PutObjectFanOutArgs, RemoveBucketArgs, RemoveObjectsArgs, SetBucketCorsArgs, SetBucketEncryptionArgs, SetBucketLifecycleArgs, SetBucketNotificationArgs, SetBucketPolicyArgs, SetBucketReplicationArgs, SetBucketTagsArgs, SetBucketVersioningArgs and SetObjectLockConfigurationArgs.

Builder of BucketArgs.

Arguments of MinioAsyncClient.bucketExists(io.minio.BucketExistsArgs) and MinioClient.bucketExists(io.minio.BucketExistsArgs).
BucketExistsArgs.Builder
Builder of BucketExistsArgs.
BucketPolicyTooLargeException
Thrown to indicate that received bucket policy is larger than 20KiB size.
ByteBuffer
OutputStream compatible byte buffer to store bytes to maximum 5GiB in size.
ByteBufferPool
Pool of ByteBuffer to be used in parallel part uploads.
CertificateIdentityProvider
Credential provider using AssumeRoleWithCertificate API.
CertificateIdentityProvider.Response
Response XML of AssumeRoleWithCertificate API.
ChainedProvider
Chained credential provider work with list of credential providers.
Checksum
Collection of checksum algorithms.
Checksum
Object checksum information.
Checksum.Algorithm
Checksum algorithm.
Checksum.CRC32
CRC32 Checksum.Hasher.
Checksum.CRC32C
CRC32C Checksum.Hasher.
Checksum.CRC64NVME
CRC64NVME Checksum.Hasher copied from https://github.com/minio/crc64nvme.
Checksum.Hasher
Checksum hasher.
Checksum.MD5
MD5 Checksum.Hasher.
Checksum.SHA1
SHA1 Checksum.Hasher.
Checksum.SHA256
SHA256 Checksum.Hasher.
Checksum.Type
Algorithm type.

HTTP utilities.
Http.BaseUrl
Base URL of S3 endpoint.
Http.Body
HTTP body of RandomAccessFile, ByteBuffer or byte array.
Http.Headers
HTTP headers.
Http.Method
HTTP methods.
Http.QueryParameters
HTTP query parameters.
Http.Request
HTTP request.
Http.RequestBody
HTTP request body of RandomAccessFile, ByteBuffer or byte array.
Http.S3Request
S3 request.
Http.S3Request.Builder
Builder of Http.S3Request.
Http.StatusRetryInterceptor
 
IamAwsProvider
Credential provider using IAM roles for Amazon EC2.
IamAwsProvider.EcsCredentials
ECS Credentials of IamAwsProvider.
InitiateMultipartUploadResult
Response XML of CreateMultipartUpload API.
Initiator
Initiator information of ListMultipartUploadsResult and ListPartsResult.
InputSerialization
Input serialization information of SelectObjectContentRequest.
InputSerialization.CompressionType
Compression format of CSV and JSON input serialization.
InputSerialization.CSV
CSV input serialization information of InputSerialization.
InputSerialization.FileHeaderInfo
First line description of CSV object.
InputSerialization.JSON
JSON input serialization information of InputSerialization.
InputSerialization.JsonType
JSON object type of InputSerialization.JSON.
InputSerialization.Parquet
Parquet input serialization information of InputSerialization.
InsufficientDataException
Thrown to indicate that reading given InputStream gets EOFException before reading given length.
InternalException
Thrown to indicate that unexpected internal library error occurred while processing given request.
InvalidResponseException
Thrown to indicate that non-xml response thrown from server.

Arguments of MinioAsyncClient.isObjectLegalHoldEnabled(io.minio.IsObjectLegalHoldEnabledArgs) and MinioClient.isObjectLegalHoldEnabled(io.minio.IsObjectLegalHoldEnabledArgs).

Item.RestoreStatus
Restore status of object information.
Item.UserMetadata
User metadata of object information.
Item.UserMetadata.UserMetadataConverter
XML converter user metadata of object information.
Jwt
JSON web token used in WebIdentityProvider and ClientGrantsProvider.

Credential provider using AssumeRoleWithLDAPIdentity API.

Response XML of AssumeRoleWithLDAPIdentity API.
LegalHold
Request XML of PutObjectLegalHold API and response XML of GetObjectLegalHold API.

LifecycleConfiguration.AbortIncompleteMultipartUpload

LifecycleConfiguration.DateDays
Date and days information of LifecycleConfiguration.Expiration and LifecycleConfiguration.Transition.
LifecycleConfiguration.Expiration
Expiration information of LifecycleConfiguration.Rule.
LifecycleConfiguration.NoncurrentVersionExpiration
Non-current version expiration information of LifecycleConfiguration.Rule.
LifecycleConfiguration.NoncurrentVersionTransition
Non-current version transition information of LifecycleConfiguration.Rule.
LifecycleConfiguration.Rule
Lifecycle rule information of LifecycleConfiguration.
LifecycleConfiguration.Transition
Transition information of LifecycleConfiguration.Rule.

MinioAsyncClient
Simple Storage Service (aka S3) client to perform bucket and object operations asynchronously.
MinioAsyncClient.Builder
Argument builder of MinioAsyncClient.
MinioAsyncClient.NotificationResultRecords
Notification result records representation.
MinioClient
Simple Storage Service (aka S3) client to perform bucket and object operations.
MinioClient.Builder
Argument builder of MinioClient.
MinioClientConfigProvider
Credential provider using MinioClient configuration file.
MinioClientConfigProvider.Config
Configuration of MinioClientConfigProvider.
MinioEnvironmentProvider
Credential provider using MinIO server specific environment variables.
MinioException
Base Exception class for all minio-java exceptions.
NotificationConfiguration
Request XML of PutBucketNotificationConfiguration API and response XML of GetBucketNotificationConfiguration API.
NotificationConfiguration.BaseConfiguration
Common configuration of NotificationConfiguration.CloudFunctionConfiguration, NotificationConfiguration.QueueConfiguration and NotificationConfiguration.TopicConfiguration.
NotificationConfiguration.CloudFunctionConfiguration
Cloud function configuration of NotificationConfiguration.
NotificationConfiguration.EventBridgeConfiguration
Event bridge configuration of NotificationConfiguration.
NotificationConfiguration.Filter
Filter configuration of NotificationConfiguration.BaseConfiguration.
NotificationConfiguration.FilterRule
Filter rule configuration of NotificationConfiguration.Filter.
NotificationConfiguration.QueueConfiguration
Queue configuration of NotificationConfiguration.
NotificationConfiguration.TopicConfiguration
Topic configuration of NotificationConfiguration.

JSON format of Notification Content Structure.
NotificationRecords.Event
Event information of NotificationRecords.
NotificationRecords.Event.Bucket
Bucket information of NotificationRecords.Event.
NotificationRecords.Event.Identity
Identity information of NotificationRecords.Event.
NotificationRecords.Event.Object
Object information of NotificationRecords.Event.
NotificationRecords.Event.S3
S3 information of NotificationRecords.Event.
NotificationRecords.Event.Source
This is MinIO extension.
ObjectArgs
Common arguments of AbortMultipartUploadArgs, CompleteMultipartUploadArgs, CreateMultipartUploadArgs, ListPartsArgs, ObjectVersionArgs, ObjectWriteArgs, PromptObjectArgs, PutObjectAPIBaseArgs and UploadPartCopyArgs.

Builder of ObjectArgs.

Builder of ObjectConditionalReadArgs.
ObjectLockConfiguration
Request XML of PutObjectLockConfiguration API and response XML of GetObjectLockConfiguration API.
ObjectLockConfiguration.RetentionDuration
Interface represents retention duration of ObjectLockConfiguration.Rule.
ObjectLockConfiguration.RetentionDurationDays
Retention duration days of ObjectLockConfiguration.Rule.
ObjectLockConfiguration.RetentionDurationUnit
Retention duration unit.
ObjectLockConfiguration.RetentionDurationYears
Retention duration years of ObjectLockConfiguration.Rule.
ObjectLockConfiguration.Rule
Rule information of ObjectLockConfiguration.
ObjectReadArgs
Common arguments of DownloadObjectArgs, GetObjectAttributesArgs, ObjectConditionalReadArgs and SelectObjectContentArgs.
ObjectReadArgs.Builder<B extends ObjectReadArgs.Builder<B,A>,A extends ObjectReadArgs>
Builder of ObjectReadArgs.
ObjectVersionArgs
Common arguments of DeleteObjectTagsArgs, DisableObjectLegalHoldArgs, EnableObjectLegalHoldArgs, GetObjectAclArgs, GetObjectRetentionArgs, GetObjectTagsArgs, GetPresignedObjectUrlArgs, IsObjectLegalHoldEnabledArgs, ObjectReadArgs, ObjectVersionArgs, RemoveObjectArgs, RestoreObjectArgs, SetObjectRetentionArgs and SetObjectTagsArgs.
ObjectVersionArgs.Builder<B extends ObjectVersionArgs.Builder<B,A>,A extends ObjectVersionArgs>
Builder of ObjectVersionArgs.
ObjectWriteArgs
Common arguments of UploadSnowballObjectsArgs, UploadSnowballObjectsArgs, PutObjectBaseArgs, ComposeObjectArgs and CopyObjectArgs.
ObjectWriteArgs.Builder<B extends ObjectWriteArgs.Builder<B,A>,A extends ObjectWriteArgs>
Builder of ObjectWriteArgs.
ObjectWriteResponse
Response of BaseS3Client.completeMultipartUpload(io.minio.CompleteMultipartUploadArgs), MinioAsyncClient.composeObject(io.minio.ComposeObjectArgs), MinioAsyncClient.copyObject(io.minio.CopyObjectArgs), MinioAsyncClient.putObject(io.minio.PutObjectArgs), MinioAsyncClient.uploadObject(io.minio.UploadObjectArgs) and MinioAsyncClient.uploadSnowballObjects(io.minio.UploadSnowballObjectsArgs).
OutputSerialization
Output Serialization information of SelectObjectContentRequest.
OutputSerialization.CSV
CSV output serialization information of OutputSerialization.
OutputSerialization.JSON
JSON output serialization information of OutputSerialization.
OutputSerialization.QuoteFields
Quotation field type of OutputSerialization.CSV.
Owner
Owner information for ListAllMyBucketsResult, ListBucketResultV1, ListBucketResultV2, ListVersionsResult, ListMultipartUploadsResult and ListPartsResult.
Part
Part information of CompleteMultipartUpload, CompleteMultipartUpload and ListPartsResult.
PartReader
Multipart data reader for RandomAccessFile or InputStream to given ByteBuffer.
PostPolicy
Post policy information to be used to generate presigned post policy form-data.
Progress
Progress information of S3 select response message.

RemoveBucketArgs.Builder
Builder of RemoveBucketArgs.
RemoveObjectArgs
Arguments of MinioAsyncClient.removeObject(io.minio.RemoveObjectArgs) and MinioClient.removeObject(io.minio.RemoveObjectArgs).
RemoveObjectArgs.Builder
Builder of RemoveObjectArgs.
RemoveObjectsArgs
Arguments of MinioAsyncClient.removeObjects(io.minio.RemoveObjectsArgs) and MinioClient.removeObjects(io.minio.RemoveObjectsArgs).
RemoveObjectsArgs.Builder
Builder of RemoveObjectsArgs.
ReplicationConfiguration
Request XML of PutBucketReplication API and response XML of GetBucketReplication API.
ReplicationConfiguration.AccessControlTranslation
Access control translation information of ReplicationConfiguration.Rule.
ReplicationConfiguration.DeleteMarkerReplication
Delete marker replication information of ReplicationConfiguration.Rule.
ReplicationConfiguration.DeleteReplication
Delete replication (MinIO extension) information of ReplicationConfiguration.Rule.
ReplicationConfiguration.Destination
Destination information of ReplicationConfiguration.Rule.
ReplicationConfiguration.EncryptionConfiguration
Encryption configuration information of ReplicationConfiguration.Rule.
ReplicationConfiguration.ExistingObjectReplication
Existing object replication information of ReplicationConfiguration.Rule.
ReplicationConfiguration.Metrics
Metrics information of ReplicationConfiguration.Rule.
ReplicationConfiguration.ReplicaModifications
Replica modification information of ReplicationConfiguration.Rule.
ReplicationConfiguration.ReplicationTime
Replication time information of ReplicationConfiguration.Rule.
ReplicationConfiguration.ReplicationTimeValue
Replication time value information of ReplicationConfiguration.Rule.
ReplicationConfiguration.Rule
Rule information of ReplicationConfiguration.
ReplicationConfiguration.SourceSelectionCriteria
Source selection criteria information of ReplicationConfiguration.Rule.
ReplicationConfiguration.SseKmsEncryptedObjects
SSE KMS encrypted objects information of ReplicationConfiguration.Rule.
RestoreObjectArgs
Arguments of MinioClient.restoreObject(io.minio.RestoreObjectArgs).
RestoreObjectArgs.Builder
Builder of RestoreObjectArgs.
RestoreRequest
Request XML of RestoreObject API.
RestoreRequest.CannedAcl
Canned ACL type of RestoreRequest.S3.
RestoreRequest.CannedAcl.CannedAclConverter
XML converter of RestoreRequest.CannedAcl.
RestoreRequest.Encryption
Encryption information of RestoreRequest.S3.
RestoreRequest.GlacierJobParameters
Glacier job parameters information of RestoreRequest.
RestoreRequest.OutputLocation
Output location information of RestoreRequest.
RestoreRequest.S3
S3 information of RestoreRequest.OutputLocation.
RestoreRequest.SelectParameters
Select parameters information of RestoreRequest.
RestoreRequest.Tier
Tier type of RestoreRequest.
RestoreRequest.Tier.TierConverter
XML converter of RestoreRequest.Tier.
RestoreRequest.UserMetadata
User metadata information of RestoreRequest.S3.
Result<T>
A container class keeps any type or a MinioException.
Retention
Request XML of PutObjectRetention API and response XML of GetObjectRetention API.
RetentionMode
Retention mode for the specified object.
SelectObjectContentArgs
Arguments of MinioAsyncClient.selectObjectContent(io.minio.SelectObjectContentArgs) and MinioClient.selectObjectContent(io.minio.SelectObjectContentArgs).
SelectObjectContentArgs.Builder
Builder of SelectObjectContentArgs.
SelectObjectContentRequest
Request XML of SelectObjectContent API.
SelectObjectContentRequest.RequestProgress
Request progress information of SelectObjectContentRequest.
SelectObjectContentRequest.ScanRange
Scan range information of SelectObjectContentRequest.
SelectResponseStream
Select object content response stream.
ServerException
Thrown to indicate that S3 service returning HTTP server error.
ServerSideEncryption
Server-side encryption support.
ServerSideEncryption.CustomerKey
Customer-key type of Server-side encryption.
ServerSideEncryption.KMS
KMS type of Server-side encryption.
ServerSideEncryption.S3
S3 type of Server-side encryption.
SetBucketCorsArgs
Arguments of MinioAsyncClient.setBucketCors(io.minio.SetBucketCorsArgs) and MinioClient.setBucketCors(io.minio.SetBucketCorsArgs).
SetBucketCorsArgs.Builder
Builder of SetBucketCorsArgs.
SetBucketEncryptionArgs
Arguments of MinioAsyncClient.setBucketEncryption(io.minio.SetBucketEncryptionArgs) and MinioClient.setBucketEncryption(io.minio.SetBucketEncryptionArgs).
SetBucketEncryptionArgs.Builder
Builder of SetBucketEncryptionArgs.
SetBucketLifecycleArgs
Arguments of MinioAsyncClient.setBucketLifecycle(io.minio.SetBucketLifecycleArgs) and MinioClient.setBucketLifecycle(io.minio.SetBucketLifecycleArgs).
SetBucketLifecycleArgs.Builder
Builder of SetBucketLifecycleArgs.
SetBucketNotificationArgs
Arguments of MinioAsyncClient.setBucketNotification(io.minio.SetBucketNotificationArgs) and MinioClient.setBucketNotification(io.minio.SetBucketNotificationArgs).
SetBucketNotificationArgs.Builder
Builder of SetBucketNotificationArgs.
SetBucketPolicyArgs
Arguments of MinioAsyncClient.setBucketPolicy(io.minio.SetBucketPolicyArgs) and MinioClient.setBucketPolicy(io.minio.SetBucketPolicyArgs).

Builder of SetBucketPolicyArgs.
SetBucketReplicationArgs
Arguments of MinioAsyncClient.setBucketReplication(io.minio.SetBucketReplicationArgs) and MinioClient.setBucketReplication(io.minio.SetBucketReplicationArgs).
SetBucketReplicationArgs.Builder
Builder of SetBucketReplicationArgs.
SetBucketTagsArgs
Arguments of MinioAsyncClient.setBucketTags(io.minio.SetBucketTagsArgs) and MinioClient.setBucketTags(io.minio.SetBucketTagsArgs).
SetBucketTagsArgs.Builder
Builder of SetBucketTagsArgs.
SetBucketVersioningArgs
Arguments of MinioAsyncClient.setBucketVersioning(io.minio.SetBucketVersioningArgs) and MinioClient.setBucketVersioning(io.minio.SetBucketVersioningArgs).
SetBucketVersioningArgs.Builder
Builder of SetBucketVersioningArgs.
SetObjectLockConfigurationArgs
Arguments of MinioAsyncClient.setObjectLockConfiguration(io.minio.SetObjectLockConfigurationArgs) and MinioClient.setObjectLockConfiguration(io.minio.SetObjectLockConfigurationArgs).
SetObjectLockConfigurationArgs.Builder
Builder of SetObjectLockConfigurationArgs.
SetObjectRetentionArgs
Arguments of MinioAsyncClient.setObjectRetention(io.minio.SetObjectRetentionArgs) and MinioClient.setObjectRetention(io.minio.SetObjectRetentionArgs).
SetObjectRetentionArgs.Builder
Builder of SetObjectRetentionArgs.
SetObjectTagsArgs
Arguments of MinioAsyncClient.setObjectTags(io.minio.SetObjectTagsArgs) and MinioClient.setObjectTags(io.minio.SetObjectTagsArgs).
SetObjectTagsArgs.Builder
Builder of SetObjectTagsArgs.
Signer
Amazon AWS S3 signature V4 signer.
SnowballObject
Single object entry for UploadSnowballObjectsArgs.objects.
SourceObject
A source object definition for ComposeObjectArgs and CopyObjectArgs.
SourceObject.Builder
Argument builder of SourceObject.
SseAlgorithm
Server-side encryption algorithm type of RestoreRequest.Encryption and SseConfiguration.Rule.
SseAlgorithm.SseAlgorithmConverter
XML converter of SseAlgorithm.
SseConfiguration
Request XML of PutBucketEncryption API and response XML of GetBucketEncryption API.
SseConfiguration.Rule
Rule information of SseConfiguration.
StaticProvider
Provider contains constant credentials.
StatObjectArgs
Arguments of MinioAsyncClient.statObject(io.minio.StatObjectArgs) and MinioClient.statObject(io.minio.StatObjectArgs).
StatObjectArgs.Builder
Builder of StatObjectArgs.
StatObjectResponse
Response of MinioAsyncClient.statObject(io.minio.StatObjectArgs).
Stats
Stats information of S3 select response message.
Status
Status type of LifecycleConfiguration.Rule and ReplicationConfiguration.Rule.
Status.StatusConverter
XML converter of Status.
StringConverter
XML converter for string due to SimpleXML limitation in converting empty element like to empty string.
Tag
Single tag information of Tags and Filter.
Tags
Request and response XML of PutBucketTagging API, PutObjectTagging API, GetBucketTagging API and GetObjectTagging API.
Time
Time formatters for S3 APIs.
Time.S3Time
Wrapped ZonedDateTime to handle ISO8601UTC format.
Time.S3Time.S3TimeConverter
XML converter class.
UploadObjectArgs
Arguments of MinioAsyncClient.uploadObject(io.minio.UploadObjectArgs) and MinioClient.uploadObject(io.minio.UploadObjectArgs).
UploadObjectArgs.Builder
Builder of UploadObjectArgs.
UploadPartArgs
Arguments of BaseS3Client.uploadPart(io.minio.UploadPartArgs).
UploadPartArgs.Builder
Builder of UploadPartArgs.
UploadPartArgs.Wrapper
Wrapper of UploadPartArgs to be used in parallel part uploads.
UploadPartCopyArgs
Arguments of BaseS3Client.uploadPartCopy(io.minio.UploadPartCopyArgs).
UploadPartCopyArgs.Builder
Builder of UploadPartCopyArgs.
UploadPartCopyResponse
Response of BaseS3Client.uploadPartCopy(io.minio.UploadPartCopyArgs).
UploadPartResponse
Response of BaseS3Client.uploadPart(io.minio.UploadPartArgs).
UploadSnowballObjectsArgs
Arguments of MinioAsyncClient.uploadSnowballObjects(io.minio.UploadSnowballObjectsArgs) and MinioClient.uploadSnowballObjects(io.minio.UploadSnowballObjectsArgs).
UploadSnowballObjectsArgs.Builder
Builder of UploadSnowballObjectsArgs.
Utils
Collection of utility functions.
Utils.InetAddressValidator
InetAddress validation and conversion routines (java.net.InetAddress).
Utils.MinioProperties
Identifies and stores version information of minio-java package at run time.
Utils.RegexValidator
Regular Expression validation (using JDK 1.4+ regex support).
VersioningConfiguration
Request XML of PutBucketVersioning API and response XML of GetBucketVersioning API.
VersioningConfiguration.Prefix
 
VersioningConfiguration.Status
 
VersioningConfiguration.Status.StatusConverter
XML converter of VersioningConfiguration.Status.
WebIdentityClientGrantsProvider
Base provider of WebIdentityProvider and ClientGrantsProvider.
WebIdentityProvider
Credential provider using AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity API.
WebIdentityProvider.Response
Response XML AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity API.
Xml
XML marshaller and unmarshaller.
XmlParserException
Thrown to indicate that error at XML marshalling or unmarshalling.
